{{CargoRelic
|name=Toad Kung Fu
|class_id=20995
|rank=Green
|affct=FAME
|source=
|description=A toad-inspired combat art. Uses reverse breathing to store energy, then explosive release.
|fame=30
|art=14
|fth=18
|civ=13
|tech=15
|ss1=prop@66642_2<br>prop@66642_3
|ss2=prop@66642_2<br>prop@66642_3
|ss3=prop@66642_2<br>prop@66642_3
|ss4=prop@66642_2<br>prop@66642_3
|ss7=prop@66642_2<br>prop@66642_3<br> (Awakened)
}}
